description:
Add accurate pharmacy partner disclosure once the 503A partner and fulfillment path are confirmed.

**Scope**
- Identify the pharmacy partner name and licensing/disclosure language counsel approves.
- Explain the separate-entity structure without implying Apoth dispenses medications.
- Confirm fulfillment status is available through MDI passthrough or an approved workflow.

**Acceptance**
- Public/legal copy names or describes the pharmacy partner as counsel requires.
- Disclosure is consistent across marketing, Terms, Privacy/NPP, and dashboard surfaces.
- Placeholder/TODO chip is removed only after real approved data is present.
title: Pharmacy partner disclosure
